mutations.description: Localize industry interest options. Adds locale-aware name resolution at the data layer (schema or translation table) so Step1InterestSelection renders Spanish labels in es locale.
Localize CreatePostDialog. Wires useI18n() and adds feed.composer translation slice covering POST_TYPES labels, placeholders, section headings, and visibility options.
Fix post-composer trigger card contrast. Replaces bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-sm with opaque bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 on app/feed/page.tsx:788 to restore WCAG AA contrast.

notes: Generation 1 — Meiosis MVC Experiment 1. Three human-reviewed bug fixes derived from real production usage. Generation cadence: bundle (all three merged before fitness_after is measured). Skok floors monitored via npm run bioiso:check during deploy window. Generation closes when fitness_after is recorded ≥7 days post final merge. See experiments/invellum-mvc-1/ for full protocol and hypothesis.
